Fig. 2. Detailed illustration of the Vehicle-as-Prompt (VaP) mechanism. By abstracting heterogeneous vehicles as prompts, the VaP mechanism projects the depot, V vehicle types, and N customer nodes into a unified action space of size 1 + V + N . updates the contextual constraints (e.g., capacity, travel costs, etc.). illustrates the transformation of HFVRP into an autoregressive decision process.
